MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Plaintiff ERIC CAVALLLARI, in pro per present.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ARTHUR YU'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Matter discussed. The Court notes plaintiff failed to contest the tentative in a timely fashion. Matter argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Arthur Yu's unopposed "motion to quash for improper service of process" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
